mnemonics.title: Scheduling Algorithm Selection
mnemonics.content: For minimizing waiting time: SJF is Super-Job-Fantastic. For fairness and time-sharing: RR is Really Reliable. For simple order: FCFS is Fairly Clear & Simple Sequencing.

mnemonics.title: Scheduler Types
mnemonics.content: Long-Term = Loads, Short-Term = Selects, Medium-Term = Swaps. (LSS)

mnemonics.title: Performance Metrics
mnemonics.content: Turnaround: From Start to Finish. Waiting: Loitering in Line. Response: First Acknowledge. (TWF)
